runtime_conversion_notes: ONNX export of facebook/m2m100_418M from the Xenova/Transformers.js toolchain, SPLIT-decoder variant: encoder_model_quantized.onnx + decoder_model_quantized.onnx (prefill) + decoder_with_past_model_quantized.onnx (KV-cache steps). The merged decoder was rejected at runtime by native ONNX Runtime mobile (If/no-cache encoder cross-attn reshape on zero-length prefill), so the split pair is used. Consumed on Android via the official com.microsoft.onnxruntime:onnxruntime-android 1.22.0 OrtSession API (NOT the sherpa-onnx private runtime). Greedy autoregressive decode with forced-BOS target language token, validated on device SM-S937B (arm64-v8a) producing real translations in all four demo directions (RU->EN, EN->RU, RU->ZH, ZH->RU).
notes: WS4 flagship on-device MT model. ONE model serves all four demo directions (RU->EN, EN->RU, RU->ZH, ZH->RU) via a forced target-language token — no English pivot. Upstream facebook/m2m100_418M is MIT (commercial-OK); the Xenova ONNX export is the same MIT license. Weights are downloaded to the device (first_run_download), NOT bundled in the APK (~937 MB on-device footprint: 274.5 MB encoder + 323.5 MB prefill decoder + 299.1 MB with-past decoder + 7.6 MB tokenizer.json; the unused 328.2 MB merged decoder is not required). A2 demo evidence is NOT a launch-support claim; the support matrix still requires WS6 benchmark evidence. AVOIDED: NLLB / SeamlessM4T (CC-BY-NC, non-commercial — blocked).
